home.heroTitle: Where business insight meets technical mastery
home.heroSlogan: ServiceNow solutions, Made Easy. Done Right!
heroValuePropositions: We speak the language of business.
home.aboutHeading: With a commitment to excellence and innovation
home.aboutParagraph1: At SME-Excellence, we speak the language of business and understand what truly matters to our customers. Our deep expertise in ServiceNow enables us to design, configure, and implement solutions that streamline processes and unlock efficiency.
home.aboutParagraph2: We go beyond delivering projects—we deliver measurable value that transforms organizations and empowers growth.

principles.title: We Simplify
principles.description: With our deep ServiceNow Expertise, we make complex processes simple. Our approach removes unnecessary complications and streamlines workflows.

principles.title: We Synergy
principles.description: We believe in synergy—collaborating closely with your teams to align technology with business goals for seamless integration.

principles.title: We Scale
principles.description: Our solutions are designed to grow with your business, ensuring long-term sustainability and performance.

home.finalCtaText: Contact us today to start your transformation

about.heroSubtitle: With a commitment to excellence and innovation, we help businesses achieve more, faster.
about.storyHeading: We speak the language of business
about.storyParagraph1: We understand what truly matters to our customers. Our deep expertise in ServiceNow enables us to design, configure, and implement solutions that streamline processes and unlock efficiency.
about.storyParagraph2: We go beyond delivering projects—we deliver measurable value that transforms organizations and empowers growth.
features: Business-first approach to technology
Deep ServiceNow platform expertise
Proven implementation methodology
Long-term partnership focus
about.missionText: To make ServiceNow implementation accessible and cost-effective for every business. We simplify complexity, foster synergy through collaboration, and deliver scalable solutions that empower organizations to achieve measurable success.
about.visionText: To be the trusted ServiceNow partner for organizations worldwide, driving digital transformation through simplicity, synergy, and scalable innovation.
about.finalCtaText: Partner with SME-Excellence and unlock the full potential of ServiceNow for your organization.

services.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions designed to transform your operations and drive measurable results.

mainServices.title: ServiceNow Implementations
mainServices.tagline: Accelerate transformation with tailored ServiceNow solutions.
mainServices.description: Delivering end-to-end implementations across key ServiceNow modules. With our ServiceNow excellence, within 4-8 weeks, we will help organizations kick start their ServiceNow journey.
features: ITSM – Streamline incident, problem, and change management
ITOM – Automate and optimize IT infrastructure
IRM, BCM, TPRM, VRM – Strengthen compliance and manage risks
HAM/SAM – Optimize asset lifecycle and reduce costs
SPM – Align investments with strategic business goals
HRSD – Enhance employee experience and HR efficiency
Vendor & Contract Management
Third-Party Integrations
Now Assist (AI) – AI-powered automation

mainServices.title: End-to-End Platform Managed Services
mainServices.tagline: Keep your platform running at peak performance.
mainServices.description: Comprehensive support for your ServiceNow ecosystem with proactive monitoring, maintenance, and performance optimization.
features: DevOps Enablement – Continuous development and operations
Proactive monitoring and maintenance
Performance optimization
24/7 Platform support

mainServices.title: Consulting & Strategic Advisory
mainServices.description: Maximize platform value with our comprehensive advisory services designed to help you get the most from your ServiceNow investment.
features: Solution Architecture – Scalable designs leveraging out-of-box capabilities
Business Analysis – Translate business needs into technical solutions
Process Optimization – Improve efficiency and reduce complexity
AI Journey with Now Assist – Unlock intelligent automation
Licensing Advisory – Optimize licensing for cost efficiency and compliance

processSteps.title: Discovery
processSteps.description: We understand your needs and goals

processSteps.title: Implement
processSteps.description: We build and configure your platform

additionalServices.title: Upgrades
additionalServices.description: Complete in as little as 1-2 weeks

additionalServices.title: Custom Projects

services.finalCtaText: Let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals and unlock the full potential of ServiceNow.

contact.heroSubtitle: Ready to transform your business? Get in touch and let's discuss how we can help.
contact.infoText: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about our services, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your questions.
contact.rfpText: Request a detailed proposal tailored to your specific needs and requirements.
